parameters.query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object('accounts', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(x.acct) FROM (
  SELECT jsonb_build_object(
    'account', a.name,
    'signals', (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('type', s.type, 'summary', s.summary, 'quote', left(s.quote, 180),
                  'band', s.details->>'band', 'category', s.details->>'risk_category',
                  'networks', s.details->>'networks_total', 'value_mentioned', s.details->>'value',
                  'status', s.status, 'age_days', (now()::date - s.created_at::date)))
                FROM signals s WHERE s.account_id = a.id
                AND (s.created_at > now() - interval '7 days'
                     OR (s.type = 'risk' AND s.status IN ('new','routed') AND s.created_at > now() - interval '30 days'))),
    'calls', (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('title', c.title, 'date', c.call_date::date))
              FROM calls c WHERE c.account_id = a.id AND c.call_date > now() - interval '7 days'),
    'latest_weekly_report', (SELECT jsonb_build_object('rag', w.rag, 'summary', left(w.summary, 600), 'lowlights', left(w.lowlights, 400))
                             FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.account_id = a.id ORDER BY w.week_ending DESC LIMIT 1),
    'open_pipeline', (SELECT jsonb_build_object('deals', count(*), 'value', COALESCE(sum(d.amount), 0))
                      FROM deals d WHERE d.account_id = a.id AND d.is_open)
  ) AS acct
  FROM accounts a
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM signals s2 WHERE s2.account_id = a.id AND s2.created_at > now() - interval '7 days')
     OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM calls c2 WHERE c2.account_id = a.id AND c2.call_date > now() - interval '7 days')
  LIMIT 8
) x), '[]'::jsonb)) AS ctx;

parameters.content:
## Account stories - the macro brief per account
Mondays 07:52 (+ manual): for every account active this week, writes an MD-grade headline (1-2 sentences) + an in-depth 2-3 paragraph analysis: the week's thread, risks in context with unresolved ages, the commercial side, and where the account is heading. Stored in `briefs` (audience='stories'); the Leadership account cards read it - card face shows the headline, expansion shows the full story.
